## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` new public API surface
- [ ] `fix:` bug fix
- [ ] `perf:` performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor:` no behavior change
- [ ] `docs:`
- [ ] `test:`
- [ ] `chore:`
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE`

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `ruff check src tests && mypy src && pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] Public API changes updated `skill.md` and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] Added a regression test (for `fix:`) or behavior test (for `feat:`).
- [ ] Both sync and async clients updated if the change is on the public surface.
- [ ] The server has an endpoint or response field that justifies this change.
